Short free consult, video-ready intake and escalation bridge between B2C and partner network.

Live Consultation Layer

HNI WORLD OS > Legalnomics > Live Consultation

3 Min Free Video Ready Escalation Funnel

Short Intro Consultation and Human Conversion Layer

This screen is designed for first-contact guidance, especially for users who do not know whom to approach. Junior advocates or staff can handle the first interaction and escalate serious matters to senior professionals or firms.

Free Intro Junior First Video Call Ready Nearby Advocate Escalate to Paid CRM Ready

Live Consult Intake

Consultation Logic

  • First 3–5 minute quick consultation can be free
  • Small matters can be handled by junior advocate or desk
  • Serious or premium matters escalate to senior / firm
  • Nearby matching available using pincode or city
  • Session can later move into paid consultation or legal matter
